segments.text: 95% of creators fail because they rely on motivation. But successful entrepreneurs rely on systems. You need the right systems for hiring people, for
onboarding people, for content, for the audience growth on each platform, and for actually distributing that content at a really high degree. And then the
analytics behind it all so that you learn from the best content, the worst,
and are able to iterate. [music] Without this all in place, you're likely just running some rickety machine. But you
get these in place and suddenly you're able to build an operation that will stand the test of time and allow yourself to get the piece of mind to
step back from it all and just be the talent that has to show up for a video like this and the rest of it kind of just takes care of itself. of
